skill.name: claude-opus-4-5-migration
skill.description: Migrate Claude Sonnet 4.0, Sonnet 4.5, and Opus 4.1 prompts, model strings, and API settings to Claude Opus 4.5. The skill covers platform-specific model identifiers, unsupported beta header cleanup, effort configuration, and targeted prompt adjustments for known Opus 4.5 behavior changes.
skill.summary: Update Claude model usage and prompts for a controlled migration to Opus 4.5.
skill.author: anthropics

security_audit.summary: Official Anthropic skill with documentation-only migration guidance and no executable scripts. Static external-command indicators are false positives from code examples and prompt text, not operational command execution.

content.value_statement: Teams need a reliable way to update Claude model strings and prompts without introducing avoidable behavior changes. This skill guides a focused migration to Opus 4.5 across API platforms, prompt patterns, and effort settings.
actual_capabilities: Finds Claude Sonnet 4.0, Sonnet 4.5, and Opus 4.1 model strings for replacement.
Maps Opus 4.5 model identifiers for Anthropic API, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, and Azure AI Foundry.
Removes the unsupported 1M context beta header when migrating to Opus 4.5.
Adds guidance for the Opus 4.5 effort parameter and its beta flag.
Applies targeted prompt adjustments for tool overtriggering, over-engineering, code exploration, frontend quality, and thinking sensitivity.
limitations: It does not migrate Haiku 4.5 models.
It does not verify live model availability or account permissions.
It applies prompt behavior fixes only when a user requests them or reports a matching issue.
It provides migration guidance but cannot guarantee identical behavior after changing models.

use_cases.title: Upgrade API Integrations
use_cases.description: Update model identifiers and beta settings in application code for a move to Opus 4.5.

use_cases.title: Tune Production Prompts
use_cases.description: Adjust prompts that overuse tools, overbuild solutions, or rely on wording that changes behavior on Opus 4.5.

use_cases.title: Plan Platform Migration
use_cases.description: Compare model string formats across Anthropic API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, and Azure before rollout.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Model String Update
prompt_templates.prompt: Use this skill to find Claude Sonnet 4.0, Sonnet 4.5, or Opus 4.1 model strings in my project and update them to Opus 4.5. Summarize each changed file.

prompt_templates.title: Platform-Specific Migration
prompt_templates.prompt: Migrate my Claude API usage to Opus 4.5 for AWS Bedrock. Update model identifiers, keep nonmatching models unchanged, and note any unsupported beta headers.

prompt_templates.title: Prompt Behavior Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this system prompt for Opus 4.5 migration issues. Focus on tool overtriggering, over-engineering, code exploration, frontend quality, and thinking sensitivity. Apply only relevant changes.

prompt_templates.title: Full Migration Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this repository for a production Opus 4.5 migration. Update model strings, remove unsupported beta headers, add effort configuration where appropriate, preserve Haiku models, and provide a rollout summary.

output_examples.input: A repository uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 through Anthropic API and includes the 1M context beta header.
output_examples.output: The migration updates the Anthropic model identifier to the Opus 4.5 value, removes the unsupported 1M context beta header, and notes the reason in the changed file summary.

output_examples.input: A prompt tells the model it must always call a tool before answering.
output_examples.output: The skill softens only the tool-triggering language, preserving the prompt intent while reducing unnecessary tool calls on Opus 4.5.

output_examples.input: A project contains Haiku 4.5 and Sonnet 4.0 model strings.
output_examples.output: The migration updates the Sonnet 4.0 model strings to Opus 4.5 and leaves Haiku 4.5 references unchanged.

best_practices: Start with model string updates before changing prompt behavior.
Apply prompt snippets only for observed issues or explicit user requests.
Summarize every changed file and explain any removed beta header.
anti_patterns: Do not migrate Haiku 4.5 model strings to Opus 4.5.
Do not append prompt snippets without matching the existing prompt structure.
Do not apply every prompt adjustment when the user only requested model string updates.

faq.question: Which source models does this skill migrate?
faq.answer: It migrates Claude Sonnet 4.0, Sonnet 4.5, and Opus 4.1 usage to Opus 4.5.

faq.question: Does it migrate Haiku 4.5?
faq.answer: No. The skill explicitly leaves Haiku 4.5 models unchanged.

faq.question: Which platforms are covered?
faq.answer: It covers Anthropic API, AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex AI, and Azure AI Foundry model strings.

faq.question: Does it change prompts automatically?
faq.answer: By default, it updates model strings. Prompt fixes are applied only when requested or when a matching issue is reported.

faq.question: What beta header should be removed?
faq.answer: The skill removes the 1M context beta header because it is not supported with Opus 4.5.

faq.question: What is the effort parameter guidance?
faq.answer: The skill recommends adding the effort beta flag and setting effort to high for best Opus 4.5 performance.
